SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index) AS boundary FROM h3_edges;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(0) AS boundary; -- Testing the lowest possible value for index
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(18446744073709551615) AS boundary; -- Testing the highest possible value for index
WITH (SELECT index FROM h3_edges LIMIT 1) AS edge_index SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(edge_index) AS boundary;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary( (SELECT index FROM h3_edges LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0) ) AS boundary;
CREATE TABLE h3_edge_pairs (index1 UInt64, index2 UInt64);
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index1) AS boundary1, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index2) AS boundary2 FROM h3_edge_pairs;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_edges WHERE h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index) IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT index FROM h3_edges ORDER BY index ASC LIMIT 1) AS min_index, (SELECT index FROM h3_edges ORDER BY index DESC LIMIT 1) AS max_index SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(min_index) AS boundary_min, h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(max_index) AS boundary_max;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index) FROM h3_edges WHERE index IN (SELECT index1 FROM h3_edge_pairs);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_h3_edges AS SELECT * FROM h3_edges;
SELECT h3GetUnidirectionalEdgeBoundary(index) FROM temp_h3_edges WHERE index = 1;
